*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0} body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:#222;background:#f5f5f3;padding:20px} .card{background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:20px;max-width:960px;margin:0 auto;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)} .header{border-bottom:1px solid #e0e0e0;padding-bottom:12px;margin-bottom:14px} .header h1{font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#333} .header p{font-size:12px;color:#888;margin-top:3px} .tabs{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid #e0e0e0;margin-bottom:14px;overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none}.tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none} .tab{padding:9px 22px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;color:#888;border:none;background:none;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;font-weight:500;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0} .tab.active{color:#333;border-bottom:2px solid #656663;background:#fafafa} .tab:hover:not(.active){color:#333;background:#f5f5f5} .panel{display:none}.panel.active{display:block} .actions{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap} button{padding:7px 15px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;background:#fff;color:#333;font-family:Arial,sans-serif} button:hover{background:#f0f0f0} .btn-dk{background:#656663;color:#fff;border-color:#656663} .btn-dk:hover{background:#4a4946} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px} th{background:#656663;color:#fff;padding:7px 8px;text-align:left;font-weight:600;border:1px solid #888} th:not(:first-child){text-align:center} td{padding:5px 7px;border:1px solid #ddd} td:not(:first-child){text-align:center} tr.beer td{background:#C8E6C9} tr.schoppen td{background:#FFF8E1} tr.soft td{background:#E3F2FD} tr.water td{background:#F3E5F5} tr.total td{background:#656663;color:#fff;font-weight:600} tr.er td{background:#fff} tr.er:nth-child(even) td{background:#f8f8f8} .ni{width:100%;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:4px;padding:3px 5px;font-size:13px;background:transparent;color:#222;font-family:Arial,sans-serif} .ni:focus{border-color:#aaa;background:#fff;outline:none} .nn{width:54px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:4px;padding:3px 4px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif} .cs{font-size:11px;padding:2px 3px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:4px;background:#fff} .db{padding:3px 8px;font-size:11px;color:#c00;border-color:#f0c0c0;background:#fff8f8} .db:hover{background:#ffe0e0} .leg{display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:12px;color:#888;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap} .ld{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:3px;display:inline-block;margin-right:4px;vertical-align:middle} .st-head{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;background:#656663;padding:7px 8px;margin-top:14px;border-radius:6px 6px 0 0} .ec{height:22px} .nach-note{font-size:12px;color:#999;margin-bottom:10px;font-style:italic} .pdf-panel{background:#f0f0ee;border-radius:8px;padding:16px} .pdf-card{background:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)} .pdf-title-bar{background:#656663;color:#fff;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;padding:10px 12px;margin:-16px -16px 0 -16px;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0} .pdf-subtitle{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#555;border:1px solid #ddd;border-top:none;padding:6px 8px;margin:0 0 12px 0} .pdf-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px}
